title: Findrek's Lava Lamps
description: Add lava lamps to vanilla Minecraft
body:
# Add lava lamps to vanilla Minecraft
![In-game screenshot showing all colored lava lamps at night, placed on item frames to make them light up.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afc81af0c60567024725e9520b314950482ae92c.gif)

To obtain them, pick a **stained glass block** of your color of choice, rename it on an anvil to "lava lamp" or anything similar, and you'll get its respective lava lamp color.

![Screenshot of the anvil GUI. There's an orange stained glass block in the input, getting renamed to lava lamp. The output displays the actual orange lava lamp.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b8fed806c6c995fca2908d4a110f2109cdb272e.png)

Then you can place it on a **glow item frame** on the ground to display it in your world.

_As a tip if you plan to use many, you can rename a stack instead to save on enchanting levels._
